props.ChoiceText: A torn sack spilled forbidden goods across the wagon bed, and everyone nearby suddenly spoke more softly.
props.ChoiceBio: Finding contraband in the load taught you that labor sometimes moves things its workers are not meant to understand.

0.TransitionText: Because finding contraband taught you what labor really moves, hard work could not keep you fed, and you crossed into crime.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because finding contraband in the load taught you that labor sometimes moves things its workers are not meant to understand, labor carried you onto another hard road.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because finding contraband in the load taught you how close honest labor stands to illicit profit, the underworld no longer seemed far away.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.
